content.en:
Not long after, Lin Lei succeeded in cultivating the Endless Dao Species, and his strength skyrocketed.

As the news spread, more human beings in the Eternal Dao Realm were eager to exchange for the Endless Dao Seed, but they didn't have enough contribution points.

Subsequently, Lin Lei used the remaining contribution points to exchange for a lot of resources that would help improve the Eternal Dao Body, but the Terran Temple didn't have many of these resources, so these resources were very expensive.

However, Lin Lei's cultivation environment in the human race was much better than that of other forces in the Eternal Dao Realm.

......

Human beings have one more powerhouse who has cultivated into the Eternal Dao Seed, Ye Tian didn't pay much attention to it, he just knew about it.

Ye Tian is still working hard to cultivate, and the other replicating bodies are still wandering around, looking for some resources, after all, copying the body cannot be restricted, looking for more resources, maybe you will encounter a big opportunity!

In this way, tens of millions of years have passed unconsciously.

this day.

With the help of the Tree Heart Demon Seed and the Evil Vine, Ye Tian finally raised the 25th body of the Eternal Dao to the Dacheng realm, and the strength of the whole person skyrocketed.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian exuded an incomparably powerful aura all over his body, and this aura far surpassed that of the original Lord of the Ancient Kingdom.

And.

He cultivated a perfect eternal Dao body, no less than other Eternal Dao realms that cultivated the Eternal Dao Body to the consummation realm.

The key is that Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed has also become extremely powerful, which makes his strength even more terrifying than those Eternal Dao Body Perfection powerhouses.

However, his strength should still be inferior to Qin He's half-step transcendence to the Eternal Dao Realm, and the difference in strength should be very large.

"If my Eternal Dao Body is raised to the Perfection Realm, my strength should not be weaker than Qin He!"

Ye Tian estimated.

......

Imaginary domain.

Innate Origin Alliance Headquarters.

The First Elder was cultivating, and he seemed to have reached a critical moment at this time.

At a certain moment, the aura of the Eternal Dao Seed appeared on his body.

However, this is not really an eternal path.

"Hahahaha, after endless years, I finally got it done!"

The First Patriarch was thrilled.

In fact, there was one thing he had hidden from Ye Tian at the beginning, he had cultivated a very special secret technique, the Qingyuan Dao Seed, and this Dao Secret Technique needed to be cultivated at the beginning of the Eternal Dao Transformation.

Once you have cultivated the Qingyuan Dao Species, you will be able to easily break through to the Eternal Dao Realm, and you will be able to easily transform into a true Eternal Dao Species in the future, and the side effects will be very low.

It was also because he was cultivating the Qingyuan Dao Seed that his progress in Eternal Dao Transformation was very slow.

In the same way, the First Demon Venerable is also unhappy because of this, and the eternal supreme enlightenment is unhappy.

Of course, the Qingyuan Dao Species is also very weird, once he starts cultivating, he can't stop, and he can't even cultivate the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, he also got an Eternal Dao Secret Technique from the hands of humans, although it is a very ordinary Eternal Dao Secret Technique, but it conflicts with the Qingyuan Dao Species.

Therefore, he gave up the ordinary Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

Now.

Qingyuan Dao cultivation was completed, and his Eternal Dao Transformation was rapidly improved.

Eternity to Taoism!

Eternity to Taoism!

Seeing that the speed of the Eternal Dao was so fast, the First Elder was extremely excited.

"Lord Qingyuan really didn't lie to me, Qingyuan Dao is really powerful, maybe I have hope to catch up with Ye Tian's strength!"

He was ready to break through to the Eternal Dao Realm before going to the Eternal Realm.

In the past, he didn't go to the Eternal Realm, not because he was a salted fish, but because he wanted to concentrate on cultivating the Qingyuan Dao Species, and he was worried that if he lacked strength, he would be in danger.

Of course, he didn't tell Ye Tian about these things.

After all, this is his deepest secret!

After a period of time, the first patriarch's eternal supreme Taoism has reached the seventy percent realm, and it is estimated that it will not be too long before his eternal supreme Taoism will reach the ten percent perfection realm.

In the blink of an eye.

Millions of solstice years have passed.

The first patriarch's eternal supreme realm of enlightenment has reached the realm of ten percent perfection.

"Hahaha, Qingyuan Dao Seed is too powerful, I can now break through to the Eternal Dao Realm at any time!"

Subsequently.

He chose to impact the Eternal Dao Realm in the Hall of the Elders.

It didn't take long.

The First Elder broke through, and the movement was very large, alarming the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

......

Human domain.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was still here, he sensed the aura of the First Patriarch, and was shocked when he saw the First Elder break through to the Eternal Dao Realm.

"How could the First Elder break through to the Eternal Dao Realm???

Ye Tian was extremely puzzled.

He remembered that he had met the First Elder not long ago, and at that time, the Eternal Dao Transformation of the First Elder had not even reached the Forty Percent realm!

There is no chance in the void realm, even if the first elder has the assistance of the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, but without resources, there is no way to improve quickly.

Besides, this improvement speed is too fierce, even with the assistance of resources, it is impossible to improve so quickly!

Swish!

Ye Tian went over to take a look, with his strength, the formations arranged by the first elder could not be stopped at all, he easily pierced through many formations, and saw the first elder who was in the process of breaking through.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was stunned.

"Eternal Dao Seed Breath?"

"No, it's not a real Eternal Dao Seed, it's just an Eternal Dao Seed's breath, it should be a pseudo-Eternal Dao Seed!"

He was very or, perhaps, he had never seen this kind of method, nor did he get it from the First Patriarch.

Suddenly.

He thought of the Qingyuan Lord.

The identity of the Lord of Qingyuan is mysterious, and he has never heard of it, but it is definitely not the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, it should be a Lord of the Kingdom of the Far Away.

This pseudo-eternal Dao inheritance must have been passed on from the Lord of the Qingyuan Kingdom to the First Elder.

"It's strange, what does that Qingyuan Country Lord pass on to the First Elder what kind of thing, this can't replace the real Eternal Dao Seed!"

Ye Tian was curious.

He wasn't going to ask the First Patriarch either, this should be the First Elder's secret, and it would be rude to ask.

So, he returned to the human realm, but asked about it.

Soon after.

The first patriarch officially broke through and reached the eternal Dao realm, and then held a banquet and invited many patriarchs, Ye Tian also participated, but he didn't say anything.

......

Eternal borders, the zone of death.

An old figure stepped over step by step, and came to the death zone where the ancient kingdom was located.

"Hey, this should be the country of Ogu, why is the country of Ogu missing?"

"It seems that the Agu Kingdom has collapsed!"

"Forget it, let's hurry up and go to the Void Domain, the seeds are ripe, and they have to be harvested!"

If the first patriarch is here, he will definitely recognize it, and this figure is the lord of Qingyuan.
